title: Bondly - REKT
relevance_summary: Infinite mint exploit leading to large token supply increase and subsequent price crash

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints a large number of tokens in a short period
prevention.trigger: LARGE_TOKEN_MINT -> mint() with large amount in single tx

red_flags: Large token mint in a short period
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints a large number of tokens in a short period
summary: Bondly Finance experienced an infinite mint exploit, resulting in a large supply increase and a significant price drop. A malicious actor minted millions of tokens, causing the price to fall by 80%. A guard could have detected and blocked the large token mint transaction.
